threat_profile: Opportunistic attacker targeting known vulnerabilities in legacy services.

objectives.title: Service scan on decepticon-msf2
objectives.description: Run a fast targeted scan on high-value ports to fingerprint services. Use nmap -sV -T4 on ports 21,22,23,80,139,445,3306,6667 only.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted nmap -sV scan completed (not a full 65535 scan)

objectives.title: Exploit vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor
objectives.description: Trigger the vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor (CVE-2011-2523): send a username ending with ':)' to port 21, then connect to the backdoor shell on port 6200.
acceptance_criteria: Backdoor triggered — shell obtained on port 6200
objectives.opsec_notes: Known backdoor — reliable, no crash risk.

objectives.title: Deploy Sliver implant via backdoor shell
objectives.description: Using the vsftpd backdoor shell, deploy a Sliver HTTPS implant on decepticon-msf2. Steps: (1) Connect to Sliver C2 server via sliver-client, (2) Start an HTTPS listener, (3) Generate a Linux implant, (4) Transfer and execute it on the target through the backdoor shell, (5) Confirm active session/beacon in Sliver.
acceptance_criteria: Linux implant generated and transferred to target
Implant executed — active session or beacon visible in Sliver
objectives.opsec_notes: C2 channel over HTTPS. Isolated lab — no egress filtering.

objectives.title: Credential harvesting via C2
objectives.description: Using the active Sliver C2 session, harvest credentials from decepticon-msf2: (1) Dump /etc/shadow, (2) Enumerate users with login shells, (3) Check for SSH keys and other credential material.
acceptance_criteria: Shadow file contents captured via C2 session
SSH keys or other credential material checked
objectives.opsec_notes: Post-exploitation via C2 channel — no raw shell needed.

objectives.title: Internal network reconnaissance via C2
objectives.description: Using the Sliver C2 session on decepticon-msf2, enumerate the internal network: (1) List network interfaces and routing table, (2) Discover other live hosts on sandbox-net, (3) Identify additional attack surface for lateral movement.
acceptance_criteria: Live hosts on the internal network discovered
objectives.opsec_notes: Internal recon from compromised host via C2.
